docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT QUINTEROS, RAYMOND (RAMON) HEARING SET FOR JAN-28-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY SOL, GLORIA QUINTEROS, RAYMOND (RAMON)
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-30-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-26-2009 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOL, GLORIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-20-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTEROS, RAYMOND (RAMON)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOL, GLORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUINTEROS, RAYMOND (RAMON) $860.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $860.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY SOL, GLORIA AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTEROS, RAYMOND (RAMON) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-30-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. NESTEO FERNANDEZ INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY RAYMOND (RAMON) QUINTEROS IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $100.00 OR MORE ON THE 1ST OF EVERY MONTH STARTING FEBRUARY 1, 2010 UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID PAYMENTS TO BE BY MONEY ORDER OR CASHIER'S CHECK. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
